title: About Me
story: I build practical systems that solve real operational problems, with a strong focus on backend development, APIs, and system workflows.
My experience comes from working on backend-heavy applications where reliability, clean architecture, and maintainability were critical.
I approach problems based on real-world constraints like performance, cost, usability, and system behavior—not just theory.
Alongside software, I am developing skills in IoT and embedded systems using Arduino and ESP8266/ESP32 to understand hardware-software integration.
My goal is to build simple, reliable, and affordable products by combining software systems with connected devices.
highlights: Builds clean APIs and structured systems
Expanding into IoT and embedded systems
Focused on simple and reliable solutions
